'''yazhoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakback|yakback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakback|yakback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazhoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzheketh|yæzheketh]] || [[word:yæzhekej|yæzhekej]] || [[word:yæzhekesh|yæzhekesh]] || [[word:yæzheke|yæzheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhozhokoth|yazhozhokoth]] || [[word:yazhozhokoj|yazhozhokoj]] || [[word:yazhozhokosh|yazhozhokosh]] || [[word:yazhozhoko|yazhozhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhokoth|yazhokoth]] || [[word:yazhokoj|yazhokoj]] || [[word:yazhokosh|yazhokosh]] || [[word:yazhoko|yazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhofkoth|yazhofkoth]] || [[word:yazhofkoj|yazhofkoj]] || [[word:yazhofkosh|yazhofkosh]] || [[word:yazhofkof|yazhofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhokotho|yazhokotho]] || [[word:yazhokojo|yazhokojo]] || [[word:yazhokosho|yazhokosho]] || [[word:yazhokoko|yazhokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhokoth|yazhokoth]] || [[word:yazhokoj|yazhokoj]] || [[word:yazhokosh|yazhokosh]] || [[word:yazhoko|yazhoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhokothol|yazhokothol]] || [[word:yazhokojol|yazhokojol]] || [[word:yazhokoshol|yazhokoshol]] || [[word:yazhokokol|yazhokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhokothotho|yazhokothotho]] || [[word:yazhokojojo|yazhokojojo]] || [[word:yazhokoshosho|yazhokoshosho]] || [[word:yazhokoko|yazhokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhokothon|yazhokothon]] || [[word:yazhokojon|yazhokojon]] || [[word:yazhokoshon|yazhokoshon]] || [[word:yazhokokon|yazhokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhokothoro|yazhokothoro]] || [[word:yazhokojoro|yazhokojoro]] || [[word:yazhokoshoro|yazhokoshoro]] || [[word:yazhokokoro|yazhokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
